docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY LUCERO, LUIS H. AS TO DEFENDANT ARMAS, FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-15-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-15-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
